blocks.label: Text
blocks.html: it would be much more useful to ethnologists if it was somewhat compressed, but the greater part of it seems very interesting. The proofs are herewith returned.

blocks.label: Text
blocks.html: Lord Reay's appreciation of article on Mriga Nakshatra of the Maha-Shivaratra, dated March 10, 1911.

blocks.label: Text
blocks.html:
Your publication is very interesting and illuminating.
6, Great Stanhope Street,
Mayfair, W. REAY.

blocks.label: Text
blocks.html: Sir Edward Gait on the present volume.

blocks.label: Text
blocks.html: I am interested to learn from your letter of the 9th instant that you are writing a book on Hindu holidays and fasts.

blocks.label: Text
blocks.html: The enclosures to your letter are herewith returned.

blocks.label: Text
blocks.html: The first 75 pages of these proofs are returned herewith corrected. The rest have been retained, and will follow shortly.

blocks.label: Text
blocks.html: Many of the legends would benefit by re-writing in a more concise form, and the story on p. 40 should be omitted.

blocks.label: Text
blocks.html: I am inclined to think that the work could best be published as a kind of 'Dictionary of the Folk-Lore of
